overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a foggy, neon-lit urban environment at night. The character moves from under a highway overpass, across a striped crosswalk, and into a tree-lined pedestrian plaza with benches.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt and patterned pants walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered corridor
large illuminated billboard displaying animated advertisements on the right wall
tall street lamp casting light through the fog
short yellow-topped bollards lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy covered walkway beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. A large digital billboard glows on the right wall while street lamps pierce the haze. Pedestrians walk in the opposite direction and sparse vehicle traffic moves on the road to the left.

events.description: exits the covered overpass into the open street intersection
crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk with other pedestrians while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection with a group of pedestrians, navigating between waiting vehicles

notable_agents.action: dark sedan waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
tall pole with traffic lights and a green walk signal
small street vendor structure with bright neon signage visible across the street

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into an open intersection, crossing wide yellow-striped crosswalk markings. Vehicles wait at the traffic signals while the character moves with a group of pedestrians toward a neon-lit food stand visible on the far side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with trees and seating

events.description: enters the tree-lined pedestrian plaza from the street crossing

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing benches and planters, moving away from the street

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on a concrete bench looking at their phones

entered.detail: mature trees in large concrete planters lining the plaza walkway
green and yellow concrete seating benches along the left side
blue garbage bags and scattered trash piled near the benches
wet hexagonal tile pavement reflecting the street lights

segments.scene_description: After crossing the street, the character enters a foggy pedestrian plaza with trees in concrete planters and benches where people sit. The ground is wet and reflective, with scattered trash bags visible. The area is quieter than the street, with sparse pedestrians walking through the orange-hued fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic concrete underpass into an open urban intersection and finally into a quiet, atmospheric pedestrian plaza. It begins beneath a massive highway overpass where a glowing digital billboard and street lamps pierce through a dense fog. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up into a wide intersection, crossing yellow-striped markings amidst waiting vehicles and a crowd of pedestrians heading toward a neon-lit food stand. The camera then shifts away from the traffic and enters a foggy plaza characterized by trees in concrete planters and reflective, wet pavement. Finally, the environment settles into a quieter mood with orange-hued haze and scattered trash bags as the character passes by people resting on benches.
